title: CobbleHelx Relics
description: The Core Mod created by Two Way that features Helx Universe items and blocks.
body:
# CobbleHelx Relics
![COBBLEHELX Title Graphic. It has blue hues along the letters with pink butterfly accents.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2ced94ddf952fa1d8d47ec1f20c3741bc78cfd5.png)
Welcome to the Helx Universe.

**CobbleHelx Relics** is a content expansion mod originally developed for the Two Way Europe Cobblemon server and modpack. It introduces **Chrysalis Relyx**, a rare and valuable currency gem used across the Helx ecosystem for rewards, progression, events, and future gameplay systems.

Current item ID: 
```
cobblehelxrelics:chrysalis_relyx
```
<details>
<summary>About the Ores</summary>
Generates 14 veins of 1-2 between -70 and 320 in stone and deepslate in the overworld.
</details>

## Features
- Adds the Chrysalis Relyx currency item
- Custom **AI-FREE, handmade** textures and Helx-inspired visuals
- Lightweight and easy to include in existing packs
- Built with multiplayer progression servers in mind
- New Trees: Jakarune and Eospark (both have light emitting logs)
- New Bush-like: Suri Crystal Outcrops (please don't eat the crystals)
- New Blocks:
  - Suri Stars Blocks
  - All relevant blocks for existing Relyx variants (apart from doors and trapdoors)
  - All relevant blocks for new tree wood types 
- Added 85 more painting variants (Thank you, HayzTee)

World Gen for:
- Jakarune Trees in Cherry Biomes
- Eospark Trees in Savanna and Eroded Badlands (on dirt/grass)
- Suri Crystal Outcrops
- Chrysalis Relyx Ore and Deepslate Chrysalis Relyx Ore

## Recipes
Crafted in the crafting grid

![Crafting table recipe for the Dormant Helx Smithing Tablet. Jakarune logs in the corners, netherite smithing tablet in the middle, chrysalis relyx in the left, top and right slot. bottom one is empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20afdb2db370013225e88935b5bfa8954fd43b63.png)

![Chrysalis Relyx recipe screenshot. Smithing table GUI with one Helx Smithing Template, a Gold Chestplate and a Chrysalis Relyx.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83c4457eedf6cec4a991b21af8b03143ff7abcf3.png)



![Image shows recipes for hammer, pickaxe, sword, hoe, awe, shovel, relyx block, relyx rune block, magic relyx block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ccf0b735da79f04b5eef9ade1d4cf611a7740d.png)
![Image shows recipes for fences, button, slabs, stairs, fence gate, door, trapdoor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f997198954d62bbad0f4f636f1982229d2adad.png)

Some items are accessible by dropping one on the Magic Relic Block. Try it yourself!
(More for these + JEI/REI suport is upcoming in one of the next versions)

![Image shows that a chrysalis relyx can be dropped on the Magic Relyc Block to get a RuneCarver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a7b36e5b41f6f6d3767f8e68ac8eaa19c3d3dde_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Magic Relic Blocks Transformables</summary>

- Chrysalis Relyx to Runecarver
- Glow Berries to Pur Berries
- Stone to Helx Infused Stone
- End Stone to Helx Web Infused Stone
- Dormant Helx Upgrade Smithing Template to Helx Upgrade Smithing Template

</details>
The Runecarver can be used to right click rune blocks to change them into other variants.

## Server & Modpack Usage
This mod is fully usable in:
- singleplayer
- multiplayer servers
- custom modpacks

While natural acquisition is implemented, we suggest server owners to integrate the chrysalis relyx item into progression systems using mods such as:
- bounty/reward boards
- quest mods
- loot tables
- custom NPC rewards
- shops and economies

## Wiki & Documentation
Additional information, recipes, [lore](https://publish.obsidian.md/helx/TWO+WAY), and future documentation can be found on the [Helx Wiki](https://publish.obsidian.md/helx/_GameServers/Minecraft/Cobblemon/CobbleHelx+Relics+(MOD)).

## About Helx
Helx is the fictional universe created for projects by Two Way Europe, our non-profit organisation. It serves as the foundation for the stories, lore, regions, items, mechanics, and multiplayer experiences featured across our projects and related creations. [More info Two Way Europe can be found here](https://two-way.eu/).

## Known Updates
Shortlist of known issues, up to be corrected for the next version:
- Coloured Suri Stars Blocks are brighter than intended
- Doors and Trapdoors missing from a bunch of Relyx blocks

## Planned Features
We strive to release an update for this mod at least once a month.
(Unless something is broken and needs a hotfix.)
The project is actively expanding. Planned additions include:
- ~~World Gen for plants and ore~~
- ~~Eospark Tree with block variants~~
- ~~Jakarune Tree with block variants~~
- More crops
- More Bushes
- Fine-tuning Chrysalis Relyx armor set effect
- EVEN More paintings
- Sea Bunny (Ocean mob)
- Chrysalis Relyx Throwing Axe/Trident
- Eospark and Jakarune furniture
- Helx Villager
- Improved textures and colour consistency (gotta keep that #0077ff)
- Config options to enable/disable ore spawning
- Spark Coal related mechanics ~~and recipe~~
- More decorative and functional blocks
- Statues featuring our mascots and prominent figures of Helx
- workbench for all our blocks
- Additional relics, gems, and collectibles
- Texture improvements and visual polish
- Expanded lore integration within the Helx Universe
- A patchouli book functioning as a wiki and lore book
- .. who knows? Suggestions welcome

In the long run we're planning a full dimension for everything Helx related, but we want to serve the main blocks and items first before going into that adventure.

## License
The All Rights Reserved license applied to this mod refers to all our lore, textures and original/unique ideas that are not common amongst other mods, modpacks or game mechanics. If you wish to adapt, edit or be **heavily** inspired by our Helx Universe, please contact us through the [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/vzDyspEMj4).

With love
- SparkleCat
